verdict: Lightweight moisturizer featuring La Roche-Posay's prebiotic thermal water with niacinamide. Effective for sensitive skin but less substantive than ceramide-based formulas.

_research.name: La Roche-Posay Toleriane Double Repair Face Moisturizer
pros: Prebiotic thermal water supports skin microbiome
Clean formula suitable for reactive skin
_research.con: Thermal water is mostly water filler; core hydrating ingredients are less concentration-dense than competitors.
